title: hook-discord plugin configuration
description: Schema v1 for the hook-discord semrel plugin. Configure via SEMREL_* environment variables.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_REPOSITORY.description: Repository name or URL included in generated messages.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_RELEASE_URL.description: Explicit release URL used for the embed title link.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_FIRST_TIME_CONTRIBUTORS.description: Add a New Contributors field when contributor metadata is available.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_RELEASE_MVP.description: Add a Release MVP field using the contributor with the most commits.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_MAX_RETRIES.description: Maximum number of retry attempts for transient network failures or HTTP 5xx responses.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_RETRY_DELAY.description: Retry delay as a Go duration string.

SEMREL_CHANGELOG.description: Generated release notes or changelog content from semrel core.

SEMREL_CONTRIBUTORS.description: Contributor metadata JSON supplied by semrel core.

SEMREL_REPOSITORY_URL.description: Repository base URL used to derive the release link when SEMREL_PLUGIN_RELEASE_URL is unset.

SEMREL_VERSION.description: Release version for the current semrel execution. semrel core may expose this as SEMREL_VERSION, SEMREL_TAG_NAME, or SEMREL_NEXT_VERSION depending on phase.

SEMREL_TAG_NAME.description: Release tag name for the current semrel execution.

SEMREL_NEXT_VERSION.description: Calculated next release version when SEMREL_VERSION is not yet finalized.

SEMREL_DRY_RUN.description: When true, print the JSON payload to stdout instead of calling Discord.
